addresses.source: Outgoing transactions carry comment 'HouseDragons2' ([example](https://tonviewer.com/0:A8584972C71D459D2D23C22F0E6F66DD257D83FBCCE3995DA03FF87283222465)). Incoming deposits contain numeric user IDs. $65K volume with 1,614 unique addresses.
addresses.comment: HouseDragons2 game payments wallet. Receives user deposits (1-58 TON with user ID comments), pays out winnings (20-26 TON with 'HouseDragons2' comment).
